response: The serum and FF levels of 25OH-VD, as well as the FF levels of TNF-α and TAC, were analyzed using enzyme-linked immunosorbent assay (ELISA) kits according to the manufacturer's instructions. These measurements were performed using a 96-well microplate ELISA reader (Dynatech. MR 7000). The 25OH-VD level was determined using an ELISA kit (catalog no. ab213966, Abcam Inc., San Francisco, USA) employing a quantitative sandwich enzyme immunoassay technique. The TNF-α level was measured using an ELISA kit (catalog no. ab46087, Abcam Inc., San Francisco, USA) with the same method. The TAC level was assessed using an ELISA kit (catalog no. ab65329, Abcam Inc., San Francisco, USA) using the quantitative sandwich enzyme immunoassay technique.
